hero.name: Sanghyeon Shin
hero.title: Aspiring PM/PO
hero.subtitle: Dreaming of becoming a PM/PO who solves user problems through planning, design, and development

about.heading: About
about.description_1: I'm Sanghyeon Shin, aspiring to become a PM/PO. I'm growing by gaining diverse experiences to adapt to the ever-changing pace of the world.
about.description_2: At Hankuk University of Foreign Studies (HUFS), I double-major in Global Business & Technology and Software & AI, building skills in data analysis, frontend development, and project management. I maintain a GPA of 4.14/4.5 while balancing academics with real-world projects.
about.description_3: Through activities such as serving as a Likelion 13th cohort staff organizer, participating in campus and external hackathons and startup programs, and volunteering as a coding instructor at Pungsaeng High School, I have experienced the full cycle from planning to development. With 9 awards at competitions, I have validated my ability to turn ideas into real services.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: Feel free to reach out for collaboration, projects, or opportunities.
